SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-03-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-03-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ALLYSYN OVERTON. PLAINTIFF MONETARY MANAGEMENT CORPORATION IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY STEVEN BROWNE. DEFENDANT REGUS MANAGEMENT IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY TODD BARTELL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ALLYSYN OVERTON; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONETARY MANAGEMENT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REGUS MANAGEMENT GROUP, LLC $2,011.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,076.00, PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR $1,000 FOR BAD FAITH IS DENIED, AS PLAINTIFF PRESENTED NO EVIDENCE OF SUCH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
